response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack and web software developer but lacks the critical hardware, SoC modeling, and AI accelerator optimization experience required for this Principal Performance Architect role. His background is heavily focused on web applications, GIS platforms, and microservices rather than hardware-software co-design, SIMD/MIMD architectures, or deep-learning workload optimization at the silicon and infrastructure level.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience with over 15 years in full-stack, web, and microservices development.
Demonstrated leadership and system architecture capabilities as a Founder and Staff Software Engineer.
Experience building low-latency applications and utilizing high-performance databases with DLang and Node.js.
concerns: Lacks experience with System-on-Chip (SoC) and IP modeling, which is a core requirement for this role.
No demonstrated background in hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD architectures.
Missing expertise in AI/deep-learning workload optimization and performance bottleneck analysis at the hardware level.
